Course Title: AI in Customer Support: Risk vs Efficiency
Who is this for: Customer service representatives, customer support managers, customer success managers, call center supervisors, customer experience managers, support team leads
Team or Dept this is for: Customer Support, Customer Service, Customer Success, Operations, Quality Assurance
Description: Managing accuracy, tone, and trust when AI interacts with customers.
Prerequisites: Learners should have basic familiarity with customer support processes and a general awareness of how AI tools are being used in business settings, but no technical or coding knowledge is required.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key risks associated with using AI in customer support and explain how to balance efficiency with accuracy, tone, and customer trust. You will also apply practical strategies to evaluate AI interactions, recognise potential errors, and organise processes that maintain a positive and reliable customer experience.
